---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance or housekeeping tasks
title: 'Maintenance: [Brief Description]'
labels: maintenance
assignees: ''
---

## Maintenance Type
- [ ] Dependency Updates
- [ ] Code Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation Updates
- [ ] Performance Optimization
- [ ] Security Updates
- [ ] Configuration Changes
- [ ] Cleanup/ housekeeping
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Rationale
Explain why this maintenance is needed and what benefits it will bring.

## Scope of Work
Describe the scope of this maintenance task:
- [ ] Files/modules affected
- [ ] Dependencies to update
- [ ] Configuration changes needed
- [ ] Documentation to update

## Maintenance Guidelines

### Before Starting
- [ ] Backup current state
- [ ] Review related documentation
- [ ] Check for dependent issues/PRs
- [ ] Schedule during low-traffic period (if applicable)

### During Maintenance
- [ ] Follow semantic versioning for updates
- [ ] Update related documentation
- [ ] Test changes thoroughly
- [ ] Monitor for regressions

### After Completion
- [ ] Verify all tests pass
- [ ] Update changelog
- [ ] Close related issues
- [ ] Notify stakeholders if needed

## Estimated Effort
- [ ] Small (< 2 hours)
- [ ] Medium (2-8 hours)
- [ ] Large (> 8 hours)

## Risk Assessment
- [ ] Low risk - minimal impact
- [ ] Medium risk - moderate impact, can be rolled back
- [ ] High risk - significant impact, requires careful planning

## Dependencies
List any dependencies or prerequisites for this maintenance task.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
